creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
This patch will add Romanian (RO) localization support to the -stable tree.
It's locale name string is ro_RO.ISO_8859-2 and uses the ISO-8859-2 charset.

  In the beginning of 2002 will follow a romanian keyboard mapping and the
coresponding -current patches (which use a different locale name and more
files).

  I would like to ask Ache (the l10n guru) and the release engineer (<re>) to
commit this patch into the -stable tree before 4.5-RELEASE; this patch doesn't
modify functionality, it just adds more functionality. Thank you !

Fix: Apply the following (uuencoded) patch. Please note that there is a new file:

    share/timedef/ro_RO.ISO_8859-2.src

PS: Happy New Year ! :))
How-To-Repeat: 
 grep -R ro_RO src/share ?
